description: Alarm fires only half the time; resolved by batch-defect replacement. Verbatim conv_7ade77dd.

messages.body: Alarm doesn't work reliably. Only goes off about half the time.
I'm sorry about this. Could you tell me: 1) Phone model and OS version? 2) App version? 3) When this started? Let me check for known issues.
My warranty expires next month. I need this resolved before then.
Got it. Based on what you've described, I'd like to try one more thing before we go the replacement route.
Tried what you suggested but still having the same problem.
I've checked with our hardware team and they've confirmed this is a known issue with a specific batch. We'll be sending you a replacement.
